properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I won't care though dark and drear my way may be I won't mind the cross to bear For I know in God's own time He'll set me free But this I pray, dear Lord, remember me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Remember me when tears are falling down Remember me when trouble's all around And look down at the river of Jordan In calling the roll, oh Lord, remember me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I won't mind although some bitter lots be mine To bear uncomlainingly I've decided come what may I'll follow Thee But this I pray, dear Lord, remember me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I won't mind though I may go through waters deep Still his song my prayer shall be If I'm right I know I'll gain the victory But this I pray, dear Lord, remember me
